10.anchor: My scattered people who live beyond the rivers of Ethiopia

17.anchor: With his love, he will calm all your fears.
17.note: Or He will be silent in his love. He will renew you with his love.

18.anchor: you will be disgraced no more.
18.note: The meaning of the Hebrew for this verse is uncertain.

3.anchor: I will reduce the wicked to heaps of rubble,
3.note: The meaning of the Hebrew is uncertain.

7.note: Hebrew has prepared a sacrifice and sanctified his guests.

10.anchor: and echo throughout the New Quarter of the city.
10.note: Or the Second Quarter, the Mishneh.

11.anchor: Wail in sorrow, all you who live in the market area,
11.note: Or in the valley, the Maktesh.

18.anchor: of all the people on earth.
18.note: Or the people living in the land.

5.anchor: And what sorrow awaits you Philistines
